metadata.name: 2006 (Daft Sex Remix remix)
metadata.author: Daft Sex + En D
metadata.source: Daft Sex + En D - 2006 (Daft Sex Remix remix).milk

perFrameCode: beat = (time >  t0+3); t0 = if(beat, time, t0);
DirX= reg26; DirY= reg27; DirZ = reg28;
PosX = PosX + ds*DirX ; PosY = PosY + ds*DirY; PosZ = PosZ + ds*DirZ;
q4 = PosX; q5 = PosY; q6 = PosZ;
c1 = cos(v1); c2 = cos(v2+ty); c3 = cos(v3+tx);
s1 = sin(v1); s2 = sin(v2+ty); s3 = sin(v3+tx);
//Coord. Trans. must exactly match def in warp S. !!!!
uvx = reg26*dist/q7; uvy = reg27*dist/q7; uvz = reg28*dist/q7;
uvx += PosX; uvy += PosY; uvz += PosZ;
uvx0 = uvx+q8; uvy0 = uvy+q8; uvz0 = uvz+q8;
uvx = if (slen < 0.25, uvx*4, if (slen < 1, uvx/slen, uvx)) *q17 + uvx0;
uvy = if (slen < 0.25, uvy*4, if (slen < 1, uvy/slen, uvy)) *q17 + uvy0;
uvz = if (slen < 0.25, uvz*4, if (slen < 1, uvz/slen, uvz)) *q17 + uvz0;
n = 0; avg = 0; loop (5, n=n+1; avg = avg+abs(megabuf(n)/5));
q10 = ds*q7; //compensation of lin. movement in GetDist and zoom uv
vx = vx -v2/q16; vy = vy +v3/q16; vz = vz + v1;
perFrameInitCode: //---------- some global vars, do not change -------------
start = 1; travel = 0; RotZ = 0; look = 0; slow = 0; t0 = time+3; lampx = .5; lampy = .5;
PosX = rand(10)-5;   PosY = rand(10)-5;   PosZ = rand(10)-5;
//  PosX = 3.3; PosY = 2; PosZ = -2; ran1 = 0; ran2 = 0; ran3 = 0; //#
c1 = cos(ran1); c2 = cos(ran2); c3 = cos(ran3);
s1 = sin(ran1); s2 = sin(ran2); s3 = sin(ran3);
//Coord. Trans. must exactly match def in warp S. !!!!
uvx = reg26*dist/q7; uvy = reg27*dist/q7; uvz = reg28*dist/q7;
uvx += PosX; uvy += PosY; uvz += PosZ;
uvx0 = uvx+q8; uvy0 = uvy+q8; uvz0 = uvz+q8;
uvx = if (slen < 0.25, uvx*4, if (slen < 1, uvx/slen, uvx)) *q17 + uvx0;
uvy = if (slen < 0.25, uvy*4, if (slen < 1, uvy/slen, uvy)) *q17 + uvy0;
uvz = if (slen < 0.25, uvz*4, if (slen < 1, uvz/slen, uvz)) *q17 + uvz0;
